claimComponent: receipt-stable replay evidence with explicit limitations
rivalTheory: source artifact or measurement process explains the observation
expectedObservation: NR-CAND-004 shows bounded signal beyond the simplest baseline on one safe public target.
expectedBaselineResult: simple baseline weaker but not absent
falsifier: Fresh holdout in Formal mathematics and bounded conjecture discovery matches the rival baseline or produces no nontrivial separation.
noEditRule: Frozen before execution; post-hoc prediction edits invalidate readiness scoring.
